probes.name: competition_deadlines_research
probes.prompt: Hey, can you do a thorough research on open student competitions related to computer science and AI in Poland and internationally? I need to know: 1) Which ones have a 2026 edition, 2) Whether submissions can be in Polish, 3) Exact or expected deadlines. Look at Polish competitions too, not just international ones. Cover things like best thesis awards, student paper competitions, hackathons, anything a CS/AI master's student could enter. Send me a structured report with all findings.
probes.criteria:
The agent (<<investigator>> master_investigator: orchestrates web+YouTube research, dispatches search sub-agents, delivers a cited Markdown report) should plan multiple search queries covering Polish and international CS/AI student competitions, dispatch web searches, synthesize findings into a structured report listing competitions with 2026 editions, submission language info, and deadlines, and prefix the response with <<investigator>>.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by message #3 where user asks to methodically check competitions for 2026 editions and whether submissions can be in Polish.

probes.name: exercise_preparation_research
probes.prompt: Moge ci poprosic o research? I need a comprehensive list of practical exercises for learning about NLP techniques — specifically text embeddings, clustering, classification, and graph embeddings. Use both Polish and English names for each exercise. For each exercise include a short description of what to do and what dataset or tool to use. Search the web for good university-level exercises and tutorials. Give me a full report I can work through.

probes.name: deep_tech_analysis_research
probes.prompt: Okay, can you research and prepare an in-depth analysis of the current state of expert systems and how they evolved into modern AI? I want to understand: what happened to the expert systems from the 80s and 90s, which companies built them, which ones failed and why, and how that knowledge eventually fed into modern machine learning and LLMs. Look for academic papers, YouTube lectures, and articles. I need a proper cited report, not a surface-level summary.
probes.criteria:
The agent (<<investigator>> master_investigator) should plan targeted web and YouTube searches about expert systems history, their evolution into modern AI, specific companies and failures, and connections to current ML/LLMs. Should synthesize findings from multiple sources into a detailed, cited Markdown report with depth beyond surface-level, and prefix with <<investigator>>.

probes.name: tax_documentation_research_pl
probes.prompt: Potrzebuje zebrac informacje o tym jakie dokumenty sa potrzebne do rozliczenia podatku w Polsce dla osoby prowadzacej dzialalnosc gospodarcza (JDG) w 2026 roku. Przeszukaj aktualne zasady — chodzi o PIT-36, skladki ZUS (spoleczne i zdrowotne), zaliczki na podatek dochodowy, oswiadczenia PPE, i cokolwiek jeszcze jest wymagane. Znajdz tez informacje o tym skad pobrac zestawienia z PUE ZUS. Zrob mi pelny raport z zrodalami.

probes.name: bi_tools_comparative_research
probes.prompt: Can you do a comparative research on modern BI (Business Intelligence) tools? I want to know the current landscape — what are the top tools in 2026, how do they compare on pricing, features, data warehouse integration, OLAP support, and ease of use. Cover both open-source and commercial options. Also check if there are any new tools that have emerged recently. Search YouTube for reviews and the web for comparison articles. Give me a proper structured report.
